name: Swiss School Singapore
tagline: A boutique Swiss–German bilingual education in tropical Singapore
description: Swiss School Singapore (SSS) is a small, boutique international school located on Swiss Club Road, set within the lush grounds of the Swiss Club. Founded to serve the Swiss and German-speaking community, SSS follows the Swiss curriculum (Lehrplan 21) alongside German language instruction. With approximately 300 students from Kindergarten through Grade 9, the school offers an intimate, family-like atmosphere. SSS emphasises outdoor learning, environmental awareness, and bilingual German–English education, preparing students for reintegration into European school systems.

admission.process: Priority is given to Swiss nationals and German-speaking families. Submit an application with documents; children attend a taster day and language assessment.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Main intake in August.

faqs.question: Do students need to speak German to attend?
faqs.answer: Yes, German is the primary language of instruction. Students should have age-appropriate German proficiency, although beginner support is available in early years.

faqs.question: What curriculum does the Swiss School follow?
faqs.answer: The school follows Lehrplan 21, the official Swiss curriculum, which emphasises competency-based learning, bilingualism, and holistic development.

seo.title: Swiss School Singapore — Swiss-German Bilingual Education | EduAtlas
seo.description: Swiss School Singapore: boutique Swiss curriculum school on Swiss Club Road. German–English bilingual, Kindergarten to Grade 9. View 2026 fees and admissions.
